1011 PRTNL_DLYS_ADMSN_CD PRTNL_DLYS_ADMSN_CD O0110J3A Other: Peritoneal dialysis (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received peritoneal dialysis days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
